# ของดีบอกต่อ — Shopee Affiliate Review Site

> Thai product review website curating the best deals from Shopee Thailand. Independent reviews with real purchase data, price comparisons, and honest recommendations.

## About
- Website: https://khongdee-boktor.vercel.app
- Language: Thai (th)
- Focus: Product reviews, Shopee deals, Smart Home, Tech gadgets
- Author: ของดีบอกต่อ team (@Drk_thorSx on X/Twitter)

## Content
- Product reviews with pros/cons analysis
- FAQ sections for each product
- Price comparisons and value assessments
- Smart Home setup guides
- Tech gadget recommendations

## Categories
- Tech & Gadget: Bluetooth headphones, smart devices, accessories
- Home: Smart plugs, LED lamps, home improvement
- Health: Wellness products, fitness gear
- Beauty: Skincare, cosmetics recommendations

## Review Standards
- All products are sourced from Shopee Thailand
- Prices and links are verified before publishing
- Reviews include real user feedback analysis
- No sponsored content — independent editorial
